original_statement: how many internally goals did marcos pizzelli score after scoring in saint petersburg, russia?
mutated_statement: how many internally things did someone do something after doing something in somewhere?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Verb replacement + Noun generalization + Location generalization + Delexicalization: Proper name generalized (Marcos Pizzelli→someone) | action verb "score"/"scoring" replaced by placeholder (score/scoring→do something/doing something) | object "goals" generalized to "things" (goals→things) | specific place generalized (Saint Petersburg, Russia→somewhere)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique可识别出代理人意识到问题模糊性：judge_thought 多次写明“The question is unclear”/“the question is poorly phrased”，critique指出“unsupported interpretation of the vague question”。尽管承认不明确，代理人仍然直接给出具体数值答案（先返回6，随后又提供7），并在日志中尝试用表格行计数来支撑结论，而不是向用户求证或请求澄清。因为同时存在对模糊性的明确识别与在缺乏澄清下的具体猜测性回答，故归入“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
